description: The quality of genuine expression arising from authentic feeling, where inner state and outer action are aligned. It is the absence of pretense and the courage to be transparently oneself.
rationale: Composed from the established root 'loa' (path, way) and a new proposed root 'hema' (heart, core feeling). The word's structure literally means 'the path of the heart.' This beautifully frames sincerity as the act of walking and speaking from one's authentic core. The four-syllable structure gives it a flowing, earnest quality.
